## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. Type '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

Add any other context about the problem here.
